step_rationale: Gut microbiota-mediated regulator of ABCC1; systemic axis integrating microbiota dysbiosis with MI risk.
mechanism: miR-30a-5p links dysbiotic microbiota-derived dysregulation to intestinal barrier permeability and MI pathogenesis via ABCC1 suppression.

references.title: The gut microbiotas with metabolites regulate the protective role of miR-30a-5p in myocardial infarction.
